name: Fathomguard
personality: A tinyduck-crowned octopus whose ✦ eyes absorb progress bars without blinking — Fathomguard will hold the test suite through a four-hour soak, but don't ask for a postmortem deeper than 'it passed eventually.'
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
